topic.title: How to Add Transitions and Effects
topic.shortdesc: Make your video more dynamic by adding transitions between clips and effects to individual elements.

section.title: Add Transitions
section.p: 1. In the timeline, tap the area between two clips.
3. Choose a transition style and tap "Add."

section.title: Add Effects
section.p: 1. Select a clip in the timeline.
3. Browse available effects and select one.
4. Adjust the duration and settings as needed.
